Title: should display table with request type name, request type Display Name, Inspection Type columns and verify the data displayed of each column

Step Action: Navigate to Request Types list page.
Then add a new request and check the values displayed matching the values entered by user when adding.
Then edit the request and check the values displayed in the list.
Step Expected:
Table displays columns: Request type name, Request type display name, Inspection Type.
The values matching the data entered/ editable by user.

Title: TC-3.1-F01: should create request type with Scheduled inspection type

Step Action: Press on builders then request type.

Step Expected: Success message displayed. System redirects to Request Types list. New request type appears in the table with Scheduled inspection type.

Title: TC-3.1-F02: should create request type with Incident inspection type

Step Action: Press on builders then request type.

Step Expected: Success message displayed. System redirects to Request Types list. New request type appears in the table with Incident inspection type.

Title: TC-3.1-F03: should edit display name of existing request type

Step Action: From the list, click Edit on the created row.

Step Expected: Success message displayed. System redirects to list. Updated display name is shown in the table.

Title: TC-3.1-F04: should edit inspection type of request type

Step Action: Create a request type with Scheduled type.
From the list, click Edit on the created row.

Step Expected: Success message displayed. System redirects to list. Inspection type is updated to Incident.

Title: TC-3.1-F05: should soft delete a request type and retain data

Step Action: From the list, click Delete on the created row.

Step Expected: Success message displayed. Request type disappears from the active list. Data is retained in the system (soft delete).

Title: Should delete the requests types (anytime)

Step Action: First: delete request types after making WF.
Second: delete request types after creating requests.
Third: delete after linking in (linking and targets)
Fourth: delete after create report builder.

Step Expected: No error displayed, and can delete at anytime.

Title: TC-3.1-B01: should handle maximum length name

Step Action: Enter display name and request type name with maximum length.

Step Expected: System either saves successfully (if within max length) or shows a validation error for exceeding max length.

Title: TC-3.1-B02: should accept single character name

Step Action: Enter a single character as name (display and request type).

Step Expected: System either saves successfully or shows minimum length validation error.

Title: TC-3.1-B03: should accept Arabic text in name and display name

Step Action: Enter Arabic text as display name.

Step Expected: Success message displayed. System redirects to list. Arabic name appears correctly in the table.

Title: TC-3.1-N01: should reject duplicate request type name and request type display name

Step Action: Create a request type with name 'DupName'.
Navigate to Create Request Type again.
Enter the same name 'DupName' and same request type display name.

Step Expected: System displays an error message indicating the name must be unique. Request type is NOT created.

Title: TC-3.1-N04: should not save without selecting inspection type

Step Action: Do NOT select any inspection type radio.

Step Expected: System shows validation error. Form remains on the create page. Request type is NOT created.

Title: TC-3.1-N05: should not save with empty name field or empty type name field

Step Action: Leave name field empty then leave request type display name.

Step Expected: System shows validation error on the name field. Form remains on the create page. Request type is NOT created.

Title: Check updated request name will be displayed with the new name in all impacted pages

Step Action: 2- Check all pages with request display name.
Step Expected: The new name will be displayed correctly.

Title: Check to sort the values of the columns

Step Action: Admin sort the values ascending and descending for each column.
Step Expected: The user can sort correctly.

Title: TC-3.1-N02: BR01 - should block editing name after linked to inspection form

Step Action: Link it to an inspection form (UC-3.6).
Navigate to edit the request type.
Attempt to modify the name field.
Step Expected: Name field is disabled/read-only. System prevents editing per BR01.

Title: TC-3.1-N03: BR01 - should block editing inspection type after linked to inspection form

Step Action: Link it to an inspection form (UC-3.6).
Navigate to edit the request type.
Attempt to change the inspection type.
Step Expected: Inspection type radio buttons are disabled. System prevents editing per BR01.

Title: TC-3.1-I01: created request type should appear in Inspection Form dropdown

Step Action: Create a request type with Incident type.

Step Expected: The newly created request type appears in the Request Type dropdown list.

Title: TC-3.1-I01: created request type should appear in Scheduled Form dropdown

Step Action: Create a request type with Incident type.

Step Expected: The newly created request type appears in the Request Type dropdown list.

Title: TC-3.1-I02: soft-deleted request type should not appear for new forms (delete first: incident request then delete scheduled)

Step Action: Create and then soft-delete a request type.

Step Expected: The soft-deleted request type does NOT appear in the dropdown. Existing data referencing it remains intact.

Title: Check to search/ reset search of name and display name

Step Action: Admin search for a specific name.
Step Expected: Request (s) matching will be displayed, and pagination will be working correctly.

Step Action: Admin search for a specific display name.
Step Expected: Request (s) matching will be displayed, and pagination will be working correctly.
All requests will be displayed again with pagination.

Title: Verify unauthorized user cannot create Request Type

Step Action: Login as any user other than admin.
Step Expected: User logged in.

Step Action: Press on builders then request type.
Step Expected: This page will only be displayed to admin.

Step Action: Copy URL displayed to admin, and paste in supervisor as example.
Step Expected: Error displayed that the user can't view this page (don't have access).

Title: Cancel the creation/ edit of request type

Step Action: Press on builders then request type.

Step Expected: The request type will not be created.

Step Action: Repeat when edit any type, then press on cancel.
Step Expected: The request type will not be edited.

Title: Check after delete, admin can create the same request type again

Step Action: From the list, click Delete on the created row.

Step Expected: Success message displayed. Request type disappears from the active list. Data is retained in the system (soft delete).

Step Action: Fill the fields with same data deleted.

Step Expected: Request type will be displayed correctly.
